Common.homeIntro: Check the current time in any supported country or compare schedules across zones with DST-aware conversion.
Common.zoneNoticeMulti: This country has multiple time zones.
Common.faqTimeTitle: Why can the displayed time shift during the year?
Common.faqDstBody: Many regions change their official offset twice a year for daylight saving time. We hold one absolute instant internally (UTC) and convert using the curated IANA zone for that moment.

Countries.subtitle: Live local time in {count} countries. Search or browse by region.
Countries.metaDescription: World time zone directory for {count} countries. Find any country and check live local time with daylight saving time.

Compare.title: World time comparator
Compare.subtitle: Select up to four countries, set a reference date and time, and see the exact instant in each place.
Compare.anchorHelp: Times below update when you change the reference date and time.
Compare.summary: When it is {timeA} in {countryA}, in {countryB} it is {timeB}.
Compare.validationMin: Add at least two countries to activate the comparator.
Compare.validationError: That wall date/time is not valid for the chosen reference zone.

Country.metaTitle: What time is it in {country} now? Live clock
Country.metaDescription: Current local time in {country} ({capital}). Live clock with DST ({zone}). Compare time zones instantly.
Country.zoneExplain: {country} uses the IANA zone {zone}. The offset adjusts automatically for daylight saving time when applicable.
Country.multiZoneTitle: This country spans multiple time zones.
Country.faqQ2: Why do some countries have several time zones?
Country.faqA2: Large countries such as the United States, Canada, Russia, or Brazil cover several offsets. We show the primary zone and let you pick others when available.
Country.faqA3: Pick two to four countries, set a reference country with a date and time, and the tool projects that instant to every row.
Country.promoBody: Coordinate meetings across countries instantly. Set a reference and watch the results.

Footer.note: World clock with real-time time zone data.
Footer.disclaimer: Times are calculated in real time with current zoneinfo rules. Brief mismatches may occur during daylight saving transitions.

Home.metaTitle: World Clock & Time Zone Comparator | Countries Time
Home.metaDescription: Check the current time in any country or compare time zones with daylight saving time. Live clock for 250+ countries.
Home.title: Live world clock
Home.subtitle: See the current local time by country or compare up to four zones with a single reference instant.
Home.seoAboutBody: Countries Time calculates live time from IANA/zoneinfo databases. Check the current time in any country, see its IANA time zone, and compare up to four zones against one UTC reference instant.
Home.seoFaqQ1: How does the world clock work?
Home.seoFaqA1: We anchor a UTC instant and convert it to each country's active IANA zone, so you always see the current local time, including daylight saving changes.
Home.seoFaqQ2: How do I compare time zones?
Home.seoFaqA2: Open the comparator, pick up to four countries, and set a reference time. You'll see how that same instant falls in each zone.
Home.seoFaqQ3: Why can the displayed time change during the year?
Home.seoFaqA3: Many regions shift their UTC offset twice a year for daylight saving time. We apply official zoneinfo rules for every transition.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: Return to the home page or check that the language prefix in the URL is valid.

Legal.privacyIntro: Countries Time respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use cookies, and your choices.
Legal.privacyDataBody: No account is required. We may collect aggregated technical data (browser type, pages visited, language) to operate and measure the site. Theme and hour-format preferences are stored locally on your device.
Legal.privacyCookiesBody: We use essential cookies for site operation. If we enable ads (e.g. Google AdSense), partners may use cookies to serve relevant ads. In the EU/UK we will show a consent banner before non-essential cookies.
Legal.privacyThirdPartyBody: Analytics or advertising providers may process data under their own policies. Use your browser cookie settings to limit tracking.
Legal.privacyRightsBody: You may request information about your data or ask for deletion via the contact address. You may also object to processing for advertising where the law allows.
Legal.termsIntro: By using Countries Time you accept these terms. The service is provided as-is for informational purposes.
Legal.termsUseBody: You may check time by country and compare time zones for personal or professional use. Automated bulk use that degrades the service or republishing content without permission is not allowed.
Legal.termsAccuracyBody: Times are computed from up-to-date IANA/zoneinfo data. Brief discrepancies may occur during daylight saving transitions. Always verify critical appointments with official sources.
Legal.termsLiabilityBody: Countries Time is not liable for decisions based on displayed times or indirect damages from use of the site.
Legal.contactIntro: For privacy, terms, or time data corrections, reach out by email.
